programmes.show_name: Can You Keep It Up For A Week?
programmes.show_description: Comedy. Annette will marry Gil, her hapless boyfriend, on condition he keeps his new job for a week without getting up to mischief with other women. Contains sexual scenes.
7/8. A German couple want to live closer to nature. They build a novel high-tech caravan that floats on water. But will their radical design work?
2/5. The castle marks the release of the second Downton Abbey film with an interview on the Lorraine breakfast show and a trip to London's Leicester Square for the premiere
12/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Philip Serrell, Melissa Downhill and Micaela Sharp head to Hay-on-Wye.

18/35. Charlie and Lee are in Beeston to transform Judith's empty new-build garden into a Swedish-inspired space with a country cottage twist.
7/35. Charlie and Lee have a challenge ahead of them to craft a low-maintenance coastal oasis despite being a hundred miles from the sea.
1/5. Alan Titchmarsh and his team surprise Louise, who is suffering from a life-threatening illness. They set to work creating a stunning Japanese-style garden for her.
6/15. In Wales, Rick meets the farmer dodging old WWII bombs to raise salt marsh lamb, goes night-fishing on the River Tywi and demonstrates how to smoke sea trout.
6/15. Dragons Den star Sara Davies takes Robson gorge-walking in Teesdale as the actor continues his mission to find new ways of spending time in the great outdoors.
Tonia Buxton heads for Santorini with its spectacular volcanic scenery and lively nightlife. She visits a tomato farm where she gathers her ingredients to make delicious tomato fritters.(S1/E6)

Dave Wellman is in Ramsgate restoring a period property - a masterclass in timber cladding is on. 3/20

The misadventures of four female au pairs, who arrive at Heathrow Airport and are whisked off to work for different families. Contains sexual scenes and 70s social attitudes.
Tongue-in-cheek Barbarella-style sci-fi caper. Amazonian space women invade Earth in search of a male to propagate their species. Contains nudity and 70s social attitudes.
Kevin McNally stars as Porthos, one of the Three Musketeers, in this award-winning short drama.
8/8. Londoners Lily and Natasha have bought a decrepit narrowboat at a knock-down price. Will their DIY enthusiasm override their lack of experience?
3/5. The team prepare for their first charity gala in three years in the castle's iconic library, with some clay pigeon shooting, a three-course lunch and a big-ticket auction
13/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler compete to make the most money. Gavin Claxton, Linda Lambert and Anthony Devine head to Oxford.

19/35. Lee and Flo are in Fleet to design a relaxing family space for single dad Stuart and his daughter Freya, with separate spaces where they can hang out without disturbing each other.
8/35. Lee and Flo are in Yate to create a Palma Majorca-inspired garden to remember Anna's husband, Shaun.
2/5. Alan Titchmarsh and the team hope to coax 90-year-old Iris back into her garden, through a perfect pathway, wildlife-friendly roses and summer house full of memories.
7/15. Rick eats the ultimate jerk chicken in Bristol and witnesses the healing power of food at a café staffed by victims of slavery. He makes a modern UK favourite, the burrito.
7/15. Robson plays host to his Grantchester co-star Tom Brittney on a road trip around County Durham, with the pair on a mission to find peace and relaxation in the countryside.
In Cyprus, Tonia Buxton sets out on a fishing trip with her father, to catch local octopus. It's not always easy to catch them, but well worth it when she cooks up octopus and red wine stew (S1/E7)

Join Dave Wellman in Shoreditch, who visits a couples run-down flat to help restore their fireplace to its former glory. 4/10

9/35. Charlie is in Fareham to revisit the garden of Vanessa and Alan. Their Mediterranean wonder looks more amazing than ever with stunning olive trees and old stone walls.
A teacher instructs his university class to write down their sexual fantasies. The students then take their chance to make these desires a reality. Contains nudity and 70s social attitudes.
